About_&_Key_Points:
About
Jeena Sikho Lifecare is one of the leading ayurvedic healthcare system providers in India. The company is providing healthcare services for the last ten years.
Key Points
Business Segment:

a) Hospitals & Clinics Portfolio
Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited (JSLL) operates a network of
119 active centers (61 hospitals + 58 clinics/day-care centres), across 23 states and 100+ cities/towns.
The hospitals have
2300 operational beds,
with another 445 beds in the pipeline. 561 beds were added in FY26. ompany has ~592 certified Ayurveda doctors and ~780 supporting healthcare personnel.
